photos.alt: Two models, one in a white and silver puffer coat, one in a hot pink vinyl trench, stand before a graffitied storefront pasted with concert posters.
One model in a hot pink vinyl coat and holographic trousers holds a small white handbag beside another in an oversized silver and white puffer.
The hot pink vinyl trench, collar raised, beside the silver-panelled white puffer, both models turned to camera in hard sun against a peeling wall.
The white puffer's oversized collar and silver quilting fill the frame; the second model, in the pink vinyl trench, stands blurred by a shuttered cafe.
A white shaggy fur coat with its wide collar pulled up over the model's head, framing her face against hanging red patterned carpets.
Close portrait, the model's chin tucked into the white shaggy fur collar, one hand drawn up beside her face.
Black and white: a model in a long white shaggy fur coat stands arms folded outside a shuttered shopfront with spectacles painted on the glass.
Black and white with the film edge showing: a model in the white shaggy fur coat smokes, seated against a wall beside a bright window.
A belted black vinyl trench, red top and white lace-up boots, the model standing mid-street between graffitied shutters under a vertical Lastik sign.
Closer: the black patent trench belted over a red polka-dot top, oversized collar upturned, hands in the pockets, narrow oval sunglasses, on a sunlit street.
A black denim jacket with tiered silver tinsel fringe and white trousers, the model turning by a pink doorway under a yellow Happy Hour sign.
A sheer black mesh top and ripped blue jeans, the model curled on a tan leather sofa, a Kodak Portra 400 rebate down the edge.
